zh.title: 雪崩币/美元技术分析：短线偏弱震荡整理
zh.content:
AVAX/USD当前维持低位窄幅震荡，价格运行于9.18美元附近，日内波动有限，显示市场观望情绪较浓。整体走势仍处于弱势整理阶段，短线尚未形成有效反转结构，空头力量略占优势。

从技术指标观察，价格低于20日均线9.275附近，说明中期趋势偏空。MACD维持负值区域，动能仍偏弱，虽然下跌速度有所放缓，但尚未出现明显金叉信号，市场反弹力度仍需进一步确认。

关键支撑位可关注9.12美元一线，若跌破可能继续测试9美元整数关口；上方短期阻力位位于9.28至9.35美元区域，只有重新站稳20日均线，才有机会改善当前弱势结构并打开反弹空间。

操作策略上，激进交易者可关注支撑区域的短线低吸机会，但需严格设置止损。稳健投资者建议等待MACD改善及价格突破均线后再考虑跟进，当前阶段仍以控制仓位和防范震荡风险为主。

en.title: Avalanche vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Avalanche is trading near 9.18 after a muted session, with price action remaining compressed between the intraday high of 9.1836 and low of 9.1234. The asset continues to trade below the 20-period moving average at 9.2753, suggesting short-term bearish pressure remains intact. Momentum has weakened over recent sessions, and buyers have not yet shown enough strength to reclaim higher resistance zones. Unless AVAX can establish sustained closes above the moving average, the broader near-term structure favors consolidation with a downside bias.

The MACD reading remains negative at -0.0354, indicating bearish momentum is still influencing market direction even though volatility has cooled. While the RSI reading is unavailable, current price behavior reflects a lack of aggressive accumulation. The narrow daily range also suggests traders are waiting for stronger directional confirmation before committing to larger positions. Continued trading beneath the SMA(20) reinforces the idea that rallies may encounter selling pressure until momentum indicators begin stabilizing.

Immediate support appears near 9.12, aligning with the recent session low and acting as the first defensive level for buyers. A break beneath this area could expose AVAX to additional weakness toward the psychological 9.00 region. On the upside, resistance is developing around 9.27 to 9.30, where the 20-period SMA currently sits. A decisive move above that range would improve sentiment and could open the path toward the next resistance area near 9.50.

Short-term traders may prefer a cautious approach while price remains trapped below resistance. Conservative participants could wait for confirmation above 9.30 before considering bullish entries, as this would signal improving momentum and trend stabilization. Conversely, failure to hold the 9.12 support zone may favor short-term bearish setups targeting lower support levels. Risk management remains essential in the current low-volatility environment, particularly as momentum indicators still lean moderately negative.
